MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Defendant David Gonzalez's Motion To Set Aside Default is taken off calendar. The moving papers were never filed. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/EHG)
